prompt: Create a dreamy architectural city photograph of a tall modern glass office tower with a large glowing white Apple logo mounted high on the right face of the building. Shoot from a low street-level angle looking upward so the tower dominates the frame, with its sharp corner near the upper center and reflective curtain-wall windows mirroring pink clouds and nearby skyscrapers. The sky is a rich deep cobalt blue with scattered soft clouds tinted pastel pink and lavender, giving the entire scene a vaporwave, late-afternoon mood. Include dark green treetops along the bottom edge and partial neighboring glass buildings at the far left and lower right for urban context. Use realistic photography, crisp architectural lines, subtle film grain, high contrast reflections, magenta-blue color grading, no people, no street signs, no extra text, landscape 4:3 composition.
